title: Thangachi
subTitle: Raja, an honest police officer, curbs several illegal activities done by Dharmaraja, a corrupt politician. However, Raja is unaware that his brother-in-law is an associate of Dharmaraja.

title: Attagasam
subTitle: Jeeva and Guru are twins who get separated in childhood by their mother in order to save their lives. When they reunite several years later, Guru swaps places with Jeeva.

title: Yamirukka Bayamen
subTitle: Karpagam believes in Lord Murugan whereas Viji, an atheist, mocks her beliefs. She challenges that after a year her life will be better than Karpagam's. Their situations change when they meet again.

title: Veetla Visheshanga
subTitle: A widower helps a woman by admitting her to the hospital. However, complications arise when the doctor convinces her that he is her husband.

title: Kuppathu Raja
subTitle: Selvam, a taxi driver, is on a mission to seek revenge on a person. Little does he know that his budding friendship with Raja is the person he dislikes.

title: Thirumoorthy
subTitle: Murthy, a truck driver, fights against a corrupt politician, Sigamani, and contests in the elections against one of his aids. However, things take a turn when he becomes a murder suspect.

title: Vivaramana Aalu
subTitle: A robber abandons his wife for a wealthy woman, but soon regrets his decision. Later, he returns, vowing to win back her trust and prove his love.

title: Unnidathil Ennai Koduthen
subTitle: Selvam and Bhaskar, two thieves with good intentions, hide with the help of Radha who is an illegitimate child living with his father's family in the guise of a maid.

title: Kuppathu Raja
subTitle: Selvam, a taxi driver, is on a mission to seek revenge on a person. Little does he know that his budding friendship with Raja is the person he dislikes.

title: Kuppathu Raja
subTitle: Selvam, a taxi driver, is on a mission to seek revenge on a person. Little does he know that his budding friendship with Raja is the person he dislikes.

title: Thanga Manasukkaran
subTitle: Chellakili and Murugan are long-lost lovers who unite when Murugan visits her village disguised as a musician, Murugesh. Chellakili's aunt then devises a sinister plot to separate them.

title: Vivaramana Aalu
subTitle: A robber abandons his wife for a wealthy woman, but soon regrets his decision. Later, he returns, vowing to win back her trust and prove his love.

title: Unnidathil Ennai Koduthen
subTitle: Selvam and Bhaskar, two thieves with good intentions, hide with the help of Radha who is an illegitimate child living with his father's family in the guise of a maid.

title: Kadamai
subTitle: Rajsaker, an honest policeman, befriends a crook and teaches him good values, turning him into a hard-working man. But things take a turn for the worse when Rajsaker is murdered by local thugs.

title: Villadhi Villain
subTitle: Meenatchi Sundara Sasthiriyaar, an eminent lawyer, is against the relationship of his daughter with Edison. When Edison is charged for the murder of a minister, he seeks Meenatchi's help.

title: Kaalamellam Kaathiruppen
subTitle: Kannan, a man from a wealthy family, falls in love with Manimekalai, after hearing her sing in a temple, later he comes up with new ways to woo her.

title: Michael Madana Kama Rajan
subTitle: A wicked man separates a set of quadruplets after their birth, while one of them ends up with their biological father, the other three find new homes. However, chaos ensues when they cross paths.

title: Kadamai
subTitle: Rajsaker, an honest policeman, befriends a crook and teaches him good values, turning him into a hard-working man. But things take a turn for the worse when Rajsaker is murdered by local thugs.

title: Michael Madana Kama Rajan
subTitle: A wicked man separates a set of quadruplets after their birth, while one of them ends up with their biological father, the other three find new homes. However, chaos ensues when they cross paths.

title: Sarigamapadani
subTitle: Kulasekaran, a casanova, tries to seduce Sangita but his actions push her away. Later, he falls in love with Archana but is unaware of her real identity.

title: Thalattu Padava
subTitle: Raja, an educated young man, works as a driver for a rich client and gets harassed by his granddaughter. When she realises how learned he is, she falls in love with him and wishes to marry him.

title: Vaidhegi Vanthachu
subTitle: A naive Karupan is forced by his lecherous MLA boss to marry a girl who snubbed the politician. The unwilling bride, turning vengeance into redemption, decides to reform her husband.

title: Udhaya
subTitle: Udhaya falls in love with Vasanthi, but realises that she is already engaged. Later, when he is wrongly framed for a crime, she strives to prove his innocence.

title: Sarigamapadani
subTitle: Kulasekaran, a casanova, tries to seduce Sangita but his actions push her away. Later, he falls in love with Archana but is unaware of her real identity.
